name: God Within VR
short_description: "God Within VR" invites you into a riveting VR journey of destiny and mastery. Discover your true identity while battling formidable foes across diverse arenas. With a vast array of weapons and challenges, dive in, sharpen your abilities, and ascend in "God Within VR".
detailed_description:
God Within VR is a Soulslike VR action game focused on reading enemy moves and true-to-motion melee. Wield your family blade and step into the ruined land of Viseran; every swing, block, and parry is driven by your real actions. Each time you fall, the nearest Anchor pulls you back—at a cost—so you can press on.

Core Features

• True VR combat: directional blocking/parries and a stagger → stun → execution loop that rewards timing and rhythm
• Multi-phase bosses: forms and moves evolve across phases—every fight is a life-or-death trial
• Physics-driven feel: swap between melee, ranged, and magic; impactful collisions and ragdolls amplify hit feedback
• Exploration & puzzles: ancient mechanisms and fragmented clues, with shortcuts and hidden routes to discover
• Lore & choices: decisions around the “Return Mark” carry consequences that shape your journey and endings

Who It’s For

Players who enjoy Soulslike pacing and the learn–overcome–master arc; VR users who want strong interaction and punchy hit feedback.

Join the Community

Discord (1):
Discord (2):
QQ Group: 692531316

Wishlist & Support

Heads-up: Some Vive Wand buttons were previously unmapped, but this has already been fixed in the playtest build!

If you’re interested in the game, please add it to your wishlist—it meaningfully boosts visibility and helps us ship updates faster.
